title: 16Pcs Gingerbread Man Christmas Decorations, Adorable Assorted Hanging Gingerbread Ornaments Festive Xmas Tree Hanging Decor for Holiday Party
features: Premium materials：these gingerbread man christmas decorations are made from wooden not plastic, making them firm, strong and lightweight. Though compact and exquisitely crafted, it possesses a distinctive charm, serving as the creative finishing touch within its modest dimensions.

Package Contents: these gingerbread man christmas decorations includes 16 gingerbread companions in various poses, each dressed in distinctive attire and featuring whimsical designs.Each gingerbread Christmas tree ornaments measures about 2.7x 2 inches/ 7 x 5.5 cm, which is easy to hang and place.

Wide Application: these gingerbread man christmas decorations is great for Xmas tree hanging decoration, door knobs, key chain, potted plants, fireplace mantle, making them perfect for use in card-making, as embellishments on gift wrapping, or in other creative holiday crafts.

Durable & Reusable: these gingerbread man christmas decorations is made with high-quality materials, durable material with vibrant colours that resist fading, can be used for a long time, also can be kept for next year's use，ensuring your festive decorations look as good as new year after year.

Easy to Hang: these gingerbread man christmas decorations with strings for easy use, and perfect for your handcrafted hanging Xmas tree. Making them quick and simple to display without fear of breakage, enjoy the pleasure of arranging.
description: This gingerbread man ornament set comprises sixteen distinct characters, each meticulously crafted with intricate details in posture, attire and expression. Hang them together to instantly transform your Christmas tree into a vibrant miniature theatre, bringing the fairy-tale world into your home. Crafted from natural wood with rounded edges, each ornament is lightweight yet sturdy, making them perfectly safe for little hands. Finished with eco-friendly water-based paint, the vibrant colours are durable and fade-resistant, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment. Beyond adorning your Christmas tree, these charms are equally splendid for embellishing wreaths, elevating the presentation of gifts, or decorating windowsills. Whether for family gatherings, children's events, or shop window displays, they radiate heartwarming festive cheer. Each ornament comes with a ready-to-use hanging cord for effortless display indoors or outdoors. When not in use, they fold flat for easy storage, awaiting their next chance to shine come Christmas season. May this collection of gingerbread men, brimming with the warmth of handcrafted care, become cherished keepers of your family's Christmas memories. Year after year, they shall illuminate your festive gatherings.
